pharma.title: Molecule glue drugs shake up cancer care, draw big money
pharma.summary: Harvard-born idea doubles survival in trials, triggers pharma frenzy as cos race to target 'undruggable' proteins with next-gen glue therapies.

pharma.title: Veracyte genomic test identifies breast cancer patients who can skip chemo
pharma.summary: In a randomized trial with more than 4,400 patients with early breast cancer that was particularly aggressive or prone to spread or recur, more than two-thirds of those whose care was guided by Veracyte's Prosigna genomic test safely avoided chemo.

diagnostics.title: Blood test could help detect signs of Alzheimer's disease decades before symptoms: Study
diagnostics.summary: The neurodegenerative condition steadily affects memory and thought processes, eventually interfering with daily functioning. The disease begins with the accumulation of amyloid-beta (Aβ) protein plaques and phosphorylated tau protein tangles in the brain.
